findings.title: Unsafe pickle deserialization
findings.message: Unsafe pickle deserialization detected (CWE-502). The pickle module executes arbitrary Python code during deserialization, allowing remote code execution if an attacker controls the input data.

findings.title: Piped remote script execution without integrity check
findings.message: Piped remote script execution detected (CWE-494). Running 'curl ... | bash' downloads and executes code without integrity verification.

findings.title: GitHub Actions dependency not pinned to commit SHA
findings.message: GitHub Actions dependency not pinned to a full commit SHA (CWE-829). Using tags allows supply chain attacks if the tag is moved.
